title: OP_RESET request body
description: Empty body. OP_RESET (0x0040) wipes all in-memory state and truncates the WAL. Destructive — call only on a beava instance bound to test data. Per Phase 13.0 Q7 the opcode value is 0x0040, leaving 0x0030-0x003F reserved for future direct-feature-write opcodes.
